volumeDefinitions.title: Orientation And Core Thesis
volumeDefinitions.premise: Start with Vibe's category thesis, authored manifesto pages, product context, and competitive framing.
volumeDefinitions.readerPromise: Understand why the compendium exists and how Vibe positions itself before entering the long-form research spine.

volumeDefinitions.title: Bootstrap Trilemma And Proof Of Value
volumeDefinitions.premise: Group the foundational Neelo papers on market bootstrap, proof of value, and measurable demand signals.
volumeDefinitions.readerPromise: See why permissionless perps need a path from early intent flow to credible market proof.

volumeDefinitions.title: Listing Power And Orderbook Alternatives
volumeDefinitions.premise: Cover listing monopoly, orderbook constraints, industry primitive gaps, and game theory of market access.
volumeDefinitions.readerPromise: Trace how Vibe argues against venue-controlled listing power without dismissing mature order books.

volumeDefinitions.title: Token Margin, Pillars, And Funding Systems
volumeDefinitions.premise: Collect token-margined perps, Vibe pillars, information/trade convergence, and funding model architecture.
volumeDefinitions.readerPromise: Understand the infrastructure mechanics that make inventory-backed markets economically legible.

volumeDefinitions.title: Solver, LP, And Protocol Operations
volumeDefinitions.premise: Bind due diligence, the SYMM LP case study, solver references, Symmio protocol pages, and builder/developer material.
volumeDefinitions.readerPromise: Move from thesis to operational workflows for LPs, solvers, market creators, and protocol integrators.

volumeDefinitions.title: Referrals And Market Formation
volumeDefinitions.premise: Separate referral architecture, rewards, points, and unresolved public-depth questions into their own book part.
volumeDefinitions.readerPromise: Read referrals as a market-formation mechanism while seeing exactly where operator reconciliation remains open.

volumeDefinitions.title: Product, Trading, And Risk Guides
volumeDefinitions.premise: Collect user-facing Vibe guides for trading, fees, collateral, risk, security, and market operations.
volumeDefinitions.readerPromise: Translate the vision into practical product behavior and reader-facing operational semantics.

volumeDefinitions.title: Dashboard, FAQ, And Living Docs
volumeDefinitions.premise: Close with dashboard reference pages, local FAQ seeds, glossary/reference pages, and the answer-engine improvement loop.
volumeDefinitions.readerPromise: Use the docs as an operating surface: dashboard semantics, repeated questions, and gaps that must keep improving.
